channel.title: LLM Timeline — SenseTime Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from SenseTime.

item.title: SenseNova V6 (SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: 600B License: closed Type: model AI model by SenseTime

item.title: SenseNova Unified Large Model (SenseTime)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by SenseTime

item.title: SenseChat 5.5 (SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: 600B License: closed Type: model AI model by SenseTime

item.title: SenseNova 5.5 (SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: SenseNova 5.5 License: open Type: model "The model training was based on over 10TB tokens [sic, taken as 10T tokens instead of 10TB=2T tokens] of high-quality training data, including a large amount of synthetically-generated reasoning chain data, which help to enhance its reasoning capabilities." & "The updates include SenseNova 5o, the first real-time multimodal model in China, which provides a new AI interaction model on par with GPT-4o’s streaming interaction capabilities"

item.title: SenseChat 5.0 (SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: 600B License: closed Type: model AI model by SenseTime

item.title: SenseNova 5.0 (SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: SenseNova 5.0 License: open Type: model GPT-4 scale; low media coverage; no demo in Western world. https://www.techinasia.com/sensetime-pauses-trading-stock-rises-30-model-launch

item.title: SenseChat-DataAnalysis V4 (SenseTime)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by SenseTime

item.title: SenseMirage V4 (SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: 10B License: closed Type: model AI model by SenseTime

item.title: SenseChat-Medical V4 (SenseTime)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by SenseTime

item.title: SenseChat-Vision V4 (SenseTime)

item.title: SenseChat (SenseTime)
